content: We are getting some const pin methods in (probably) 1.83 https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/130136. I'm not sure this helps us much but maybe for const constructors?

In general we are getting a whole ton of new const functionality in 1.82 and 1.83 - use of &mut in signatures, and all the functions that use either that or const_precise_live_drops. Should make some things nicer
Our pin macro would probably require const closures + const traits
